details.test: Task 1: Book earliest in-person anxiety counseling after 5pm within next 7 days near 94103
Task 2: Add sliding-scale trauma therapists under $80 to comparison list
Task 3: Submit insurance coverage question for cheapest plan with copay <= $30
Task 4: Register for next-month social anxiety group at 6-8 pm with pay-later option
Task 5: Start booking telehealth weekend free 15-minute consult
Task 6: Subscribe to monthly parenting-focused newsletter
Task 7: Complete depression self-assessment and save two recommended articles
Task 8: Create safety plan with two local crisis hotlines
